/usr/bin/ar qc libhedgebot_lib.a CMakeFiles/hedgebot_lib.dir/src/market_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hedgebot_lib.dir/src/option_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hedgebot_lib.dir/src/bsm_pricer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hedgebot_lib.dir/src/merton_pricer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hedgebot_lib.dir/src/greeks_calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hedgebot_lib.dir/src/model_calibrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hedgebot_lib.dir/src/hedging_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hedgebot_lib.dir/src/broker_simulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hedgebot_lib.dir/src/risk_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hedgebot_lib.dir/src/backtester.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hedgebot_lib.dir/src/monte_carlo_simulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hedgebot_lib.dir/src/logger.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libhedgebot_lib.a
